title: Is it possible to integrate kobotoolbox with monday.com?
excerpt: It is possible to integrate with kobotoolbox with monday.com

posts.author: Asoamaime (Asoamaime)
posts.cookedHtml: It is possible to integrate with kobotoolbox with monday.com

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Asoamaime ,

Welcome to the monday community!

It is possible to integrate monday with KoboToolbox via integration platforms such as Make.com.

If you need any professional assistance our team at thespelas.com would be more than happy to help you! Please contact me should you be interested in our services.

Best Regards,

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
